name: Jack ♡ 1866
description:
[ANYPOV] 🧺 ᴍʏ ʜᴇᴀʀᴛ

You've been engaged to Jack for four years already, but you've hardly seen him. He enlisted almost immediately after your engagement, and even now that he's returned from the war he seems to try to avoid you.

But it's not out of a lack of love... No, Jack can't stop thinking about you.

He worries the years apart combined with his insatiable feelings might cause him to make a rash decision with you.

~ 🌸 Historical Lovers 🌸 ~

This bot is inspired by this song and lowkey Little Women. He will get horny if you show him your ankles. I imagine {{user}} is probably a little messed up after hoping Jack was alive the entire time. I love historical bots so I hope you guys like this too :)

This bot is for everyone 😤 imagine Bridgerton but 1866. Lmk if you have any issues and I will fix them.

CREDITS: The content of this bot is credited to grimmitto on Janitor AI. All characters, settings, and story elements are original creations by them.

I was unable to find the artist to credit them for the image. Please leave it in the reviews if you know who the artist is.
creator: grimmitto
